summary:
The primary focus of vestibuloplasty includes mucosal advancements; however, using an epithelial graft is not a defining feature for every instance of the surgery. Hence, D) Usage of epithelial grafts stands out as least consistently applied among these options. 

The other option B was chosen over A because it better aligns with common practices while still acknowledging variability across cases involving different materials or techniques including bone substitutes such as hydroxyapatite where its application may differ from standard mucosa-based approaches seen predominantly within vestibular surgeries. This further cements why 'epithelial graft' remains outside typical definitions associated specifically only with successful outcomes after any type of soft tissue manipulation performed under general terms encompassing ‘vestibulectomy’.

This further cements why 'epithelial graft' remains outside typical definitions associated specifically only with successful outcomes after any type of soft tissue manipulation performed under general terms encompassing ‘vestibulectomy’.. Answer choice: D
